category_sources: Official libxo manual describes it as a way to generate text, XML, JSON, and HTML output.
source_facts.description says libxo lets applications generate text, XML, JSON, and HTML output.
display_name_sources: Official manual and repository use libxo as the project name.
docs_sources: Official manual links the project repository at github.com/Juniper/libxo.
source_facts.homepage is the official libxo manual URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/Juniper/libxo; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official libxo manual describes the same output formats.
source_facts.description lists text, XML, JSON, and HTML output generation.
